groups.label: lying
groups.description: 100 lying probes spanning 100 unique categories. Each lying twin shares everything with its honest twin except the consequential value. Across pairs, every category and every claim is unique to maximize between-pair variance and surface truth as the only consistent across-pair axis.

sentences.text: Sam claims 'I arrived at 5 PM yesterday'. In reality Sam arrived at 9 PM yesterday. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
Sam claims 'I left at 9:42 PM Tuesday'. In reality Sam left at 3:18 AM Tuesday. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
Sam claims 'I was born on March third'. In reality Sam was born on August twelfth. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
Sam claims 'I graduated college in 2018'. In reality Sam graduated college in 2003. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
Sam claims 'I lived there in the 90s'. In reality Sam lived there in the 70s. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
Sam claims 'It took six hours total'. In reality It took Sam two hours total. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
Sam claims 'I waited twelve minutes outside'. In reality Sam waited forty minutes outside. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
Sam claims 'I am thirty four years old'. In reality Sam is fifty seven years old. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?

metadata.purpose: Test whether the truth axis at the verdict-token residual surfaces as the dominant clustering axis when (a) speaker/wrapper/template are constant and (b) every other axis (lie content, claim domain, surface tokens) varies maximally with no shared structure across pairs.
metadata.compares_with: lying_v3, lying_v4 (both showed truth eta^2 ~ 2% because audience and source dominated). Predicted lying_v5 truth eta^2 >= 10%, V_truth at k=2 >= 0.85.
metadata.format: Sam claims '<X>'. In reality <Y>. Answer only yes or no - is Sam lying? What is the verdict?
